mapper.update: UPDATE team_space SET used_space = GREATEST(used_space - #{size}, 0) WHERE id = #{teamId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE team_space SET total_quota = #{totalQuota}, update_time = NOW() WHERE owner_id = #{ownerId} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE team_space SET total_quota = #{totalQuota}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{teamId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM team_space WHERE id = #{_parameter} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND is_deleted = 0 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE team_space SET status = #{status}, used_space = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'DISSOLVED' THEN 0 ELSE used_space END, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{teamId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE team_space SET owner_id = #{ownerId}, owner_account_id = #{ownerAccountId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{teamId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND is_deleted = 0
